race.comment: SAVVY SPY (9) talented staying prospect near his peak for this third-up. Knocked up late with a fighting second to THROTTLE RESPONSE over 1550m here last Friday. Drawn out and should get his chance. Each way. OKAMI STAR (16) holding his form this campaign and can give a ton of cheek again tonight. Made a mid-race move with a fighting third over this track and trip last Friday. Sure to be thereabouts and gets through the going. DOLLARS (1) near his top for this and proven in the going. Back in grade when he jumped in trip for a decisive victory as fav over 1614m at Taree in C1 class. Gets the right run from the draw which can offset the big weight. Each way. DEFENDANT (4) staying bred type who stretches out to this trip for the first time. Rounded them up well with a narrow win over 1550m at this track third-up. Sure to be thereabouts.
